Honeywell AeroDocs — Hydraulic Pump Maintenance Manual (Test Fixture)

Document ID: TEST-MANUAL-001
Part Number: PN-HYD-4521-A
Alternate P/N: HYD-4521

Overview
This manual covers inspection and replacement of the hydraulic pump assembly
used in auxiliary power unit (APU) systems.

Procedure
1. Depressurize the hydraulic system before removing the pump.
2. Inspect the pump housing for cracks or fluid leaks.
3. Replace the seal kit if wear exceeds 0.5 mm.

Barcode Reference: 1234567890128

Troubleshooting
- Low pressure: check inlet filter and P/N HYD-4521 seal ring.
- Overheating: verify cooler flow rate per Honeywell spec 14 CFR Part 43.

Comments
Technician note: Always torque mounting bolts to 45 Nm.
